headline: Is It Time To Reassess 3M (MMM) After Legal Settlements And Restructuring Efforts?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether 3M is genuinely good value at its current price, or if the recent optimism has already been fully reflected in the share price. The stock last closed at US$151.24, with returns of 1.4% over the past week, 0.9% over the past month, a 6.5% decline year to date, 18.1% over the past year, and 89.0% over three years. Recent headlines have focused on 3M's restructuring efforts and ongoing legal settlements, which continue to shape how investors assess both risk...
